mapper.select:
SELECT user_acs_log_oid AS userAcsLogOid, user_oid AS userOid, user_id, acs_type AS acsType, rqt_uri AS rqtUri, rqt_mthd AS rqtMthd, stts_cd AS sttsCd, rspns_time_ms AS rspnsTimeMs, error_msg AS errorMsg, ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(ip_addr, #{aesKey}) AS ipAddr, brwsr_nm AS brwsrNm, os_nm AS osNm, dvc_type AS dvcType, reg_dt AS regDt FROM ${schema}.user_acs_log
AND user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchValue}, '%')
AND rqt_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchValue}, '%')
AND ${schema}.fn_decrypt_aes(ip_addr, #{aesKey}) LIKE CAST(CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchValue}, '%') AS CHAR)
AND reg_dt >= #{filter.startDate}
AND reg_dt <= #{filter.endDate}
AND reg_dt >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{filter.excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d')
AND reg_dt < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(REPLACE(#{filter.excelExportYm}, '-', ''), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
